textByHash.45322827746c872f454a79f995d67548599c1ae7: And the winner is... The stranger in black!
textByHash.47f17b5d57722e5cbd36cf4e6b47eae682e57909: Is that all chump? Don't worry, I have a spare!
textByHash.539ab78288a453d645e18ff1f3e680f166ea58b3: So you're calling it quits here for now?
textByHash.565cf74a65115e84ba0f9e8e3df9fa32606d3f57: Ok, we've got all the fishermen! It's time to roll!
textByHash.6dbc438a723b570cd0302a3bececaeb1a94c0fc8: We have a new winner! The heroic-looking person who was fishing by the pipes has caught the biggest carp I've seen since Grandpa Jack used to compete!
textByHash.74047d50e520443178b5beae3285d88062a380bb: Hmm. You'd better go and take the area by the pipes then.
textByHash.78622f808cd052fbf4b9e1fe27b691b9ba20eb64: Enter the great Hemenster fishing competition!
textByHash.a0505aa198af2c4b11245b9890ba1b46e9e9282f: Hey, you need to pay to enter the competition first! Only 5 gp entrance fee!
textByHash.b066e6e084263f6d6e88fbeb58f6111449b3399d: Well, we'll just wait till time is up.
textByHash.ba601411188e17283d138add7d29ce53f5920087: You've already paid, you don't need to pay me again!
textByHash.c056f4c5d0b6f182289c38c7870b0f95bc79fe64: Ok, nearly everyone is in their place already. You fish in the spot by the willow tree, and the Sinister Stranger, you fish by the pipes.
textByHash.d1e632648c4bab8345d50689501496aaf3c7c6db: So any hints on how to fish?
textByHash.ff13d2e92260e770177b934b1fc0bfa203016e70: So how are you doing so far?
